title: astragalus orbiculatus
intro: Astragalus orbiculatus, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help the body adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus orbiculatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus orbiculatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
